title: pentanema salicinum subsp. asperum
intro: Pentanema salicinum subsp. asperum, also known as a variant of the Iron Wort plant, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its salicin content, which is similar to aspirin and provides anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Pentanema salicinum subsp. asperum include relief from headaches, fever reduction, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures of the plant, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
